questions.question: What are the three main approaches to NLP, and how do they differ?
expectedPoints: Rule-based systems use hand-crafted linguistic rules
Statistical methods use probability and machine learning
Neural approaches use deep learning models like RNNs and transformers

questions.question: Describe the complete NLP pipeline with examples at each stage.
expectedPoints: POS Tagging: identifying parts of speech
Semantic Analysis: extracting meaning and relationships
